articles.value: Am I the Bolas? - But I Told You!
articles.excerpt: Just how important are pre-game conversations to how your playgroup's game shakes out? Mike delves into the details in this weeks' AITB.

articles.value: Building Kinnan, Bonder Prodigy for cEDH
articles.excerpt: Kinnan, Bonder Prodigy is one of the strongest commanders in cEDH. But how do you build him, and what are the combo lines?

articles.value: Five Different Ways To Use Echocasting Symposium
articles.excerpt: Alejandro finds five excellent ways to use Echocasting Symposium, that range from skipping every opponent's turn to sharing Group Hug cards.

articles.value: The Top 20 Commanders With Two-Card Combos
articles.excerpt: Kicking off Combo Week at EDHREC is a list of the top 20 commanders that have two-card combos. Do you play any of these?

articles.value: Let's Learn the Enemy Color Pairs Before Secrets of Strixhaven
articles.excerpt: What is an enemy color pair, and what are the pairs called? Let's make sure you know the details before Secrets of Strixhaven prerelase.
